message:
fix(web): remove phage.db.gz to fix database hash mismatch

The Vercel build runs VACUUM/REINDEX on phage.db which changes its
content and hash. The pre-committed phage.db.gz was compressed from
the pre-optimized database, causing hash mismatches when loaded:

"Database hash mismatch (expected X, got Y)"

Removing phage.db.gz forces the app to load the .db file directly,
which matches the manifest hash generated during build.

The service worker and DatabaseLoader still support .db.gz for future
use when the build process is updated to generate the compressed
version after optimization.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
